author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Dhanakosa Opening 1993 - Questions and Answers
content:
QUESTIONS AND ANSWERS ON THE OPENING OF DHANAKOSA RETREAT
CENTRE

CONTENTS



1-2 The fundamental principle of Buddhism - non-vi olence
3-5 Alternatives to 'working in the world'
5-7 Equality and egalitarianism
7 The uniqueness of all things The void nature of all things and
its absolute unique individuality
8 Questions about the Mindfulness of Breathing med itation
9 Not ending a meditation session too abruptly
9-10 The arising of the Bodhicitta as representing the altruistic dimension of Going
for Refuge
11 Not to be "too nice"
11 Future difficulties for the Dharma due to world events
12 Bhante's openly being a Buddhist when in the Ar my
Being heroic
13 Has founding the FWBO hindered Bhante's spiritu al development?
14 Two modern authors that Bhante finds worthy of respect
15 Rebirth with ones known in previous lives
16 Do spirit guides of daemons exist?
16-17 Talking about people behind their backs?
